title: Ahoy Pirate Telescope Favors (17cm x 16cm) - Black Party Accessory - Unique & Fun Children's Pirate-Themed Gift for Adventure-Lovers - 8ct
features: AHOY THERE, MATEYS: Presenting the sleek and stylish black ahoy pirate telescope favors (17cm x 16cm), perfect for children's pirate-themed gifts and adventure lovers who wish to embark on exciting treasure hunts.

DURABILITY & QUALITY: Crafted from a high-quality, durable material designed to withstand the test of time and endless adventures, making it the perfect companion for your young pirates and explorers.
UNFORGETTABLE PIRATE-THEMED GIFT: These 8ct ahoy pirate telescope favors make a unique and fun gift that will delight adventure-loving kids and ignite their imagination! Treasure map not included.

CONVENIENT & EASY TO USE: Our pirate telescope favors are designed with user-friendliness in mind, as they are convenient and simple to use for even the smallest of hands, ensuring hours of fun and imaginative play.

CAPTURE THE PIRATE ADVENTURES: Whether it's for a themed birthday party, a playdate, or just an afternoon with friends, these ahoy pirate telescope favors will transport your little pirates into a world of mystery and excitement.
